company_core.name: Genspark
company_core.description: The main product is an AI-driven search engine that utilizes advanced algorithms to enhance search capabilities and improve the relevance of results. Additionally, it incorporates an AI agent framework aimed at increasing user engagement with the content.

founders.name: Ray Zhong
founders.background:
Ray Zhong served as Chief Architect of DuerOS at Baidu, Inc. from 2017 to 2023, where he led the development of the conversational AI platform. Prior to that, he was a staff software engineer at Google for a decade, contributing to core search ranking algorithms and the Google Assistant's home automation features. He holds a Master's degree in Mathematics and Computer Science from Sun Yat-sen University.

---
Sources: linkedin.com/in/ray-zhong-a3735627, x.com/ruradium

founders.name: Lenjoy Lin
founders.background:
Lenjoy Lin has over 12 years of experience in engineering leadership, having served as Head of Engineering for TikTok Ads Measurement & Targeting at ByteDance, where he founded and scaled the department. Prior to that, he led the Consumer Personalization Engineering Team at Houzz and was a Tech Lead for Homefeed Ads at Pinterest. He began his career as a Staff Software Engineer at YouTube, where he was a founding member responsible for rebuilding the ads serving and quality stack. Lenjoy holds a Bachelor's degree in Mathematics from Zhejiang University.

---
Sources: linkedin.com/in/lenjoy, x.com/lenjoy

founders.name: Wen S.
founders.background:
• Co-Founder & CEO of Smarking Inc. (acquired 2022)  
• Chief Product and Technology Officer at JustPark  
• B.S. in Automotive Engineering from Nanjing University

---
Sources: linkedin.com/in/wen-sang, twitter.com/sang_wen

founders.name: Kay Zhu
founders.background:
Kay Zhu is a seasoned technology leader with a strong background in AI and search technologies. Prior to co-founding Genspark, she served as CTO at Xiaodu Technology, where she initiated the company from the ground up and secured Series B financing, achieving a $5.1 billion valuation. Before that, she was the Chief Architect of Baidu Search, leading innovations in AI and launching the world's first DNN ranking model. Her experience also includes a role as a Staff Software Engineer at Google, where she contributed to core search ranking and web anti-spam technologies.

---
Sources: linkedin.com/in/kay-zhu-522b275

founders.name: Eric Jing
founders.background:
Eric Jing is a seasoned entrepreneur and technology executive with a strong track record in AI and search technologies. He co-founded and served as CEO of Genspark in 2023, and previously led Xiaodu Technology, Inc. as CEO from 2020 to 2023, where he successfully closed Series B financing at a $5.5 billion valuation. Prior to that, he was the Chief Product Manager of Search and Corporate VP at Baidu, Inc., driving innovations in web search and AI products, and he also held a key role as Principal Development Manager of Bing Search at Microsoft, where he contributed to the launch of Bing.com.

---
Sources: linkedin.com/in/eric-jing-5397a1b

agent_output.markdown:
# Genspark | Meeting Brief
*2026-03-03*

# Genspark — Investor Meeting Briefing

---

## TL;DR
Genspark is an AI-driven search engine and agent framework company targeting B2B enterprise productivity and automation. [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/54909419) The company has raised $435M in total funding, including a $275M Series B closed in November 2025, signaling strong investor conviction. [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/54909419) Headcount has surged 55.2% in 90 days and web traffic is up 16.3% in 30 days, pointing to aggressive scaling on both the team and product fronts. [[4]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/54909419)

---

## Why This Meeting Matters
• **Exceptional hiring velocity:** 55.2% headcount growth in 90 days — from a base of 45 employees — indicates a company in rapid build-out mode, likely deploying fresh Series B capital at pace. [[4]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/54909419)
• **Fresh, large-scale capital event:** A $275M Series B closed November 2025 is one of the larger recent AI search rounds, with backing from Emergence Capital, LG Technology Ventures, SBI Investment, UpHonest Capital, and Lanchi Ventures — suggesting institutional validation. [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/54909419)
• **Accelerating product traction:** 14.94M monthly web visits growing at 16.3% month-over-month demonstrates real user adoption, not just fundraising momentum. [[4]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/54909419)
• **Deep founding team pedigree:** Founders bring direct experience from Baidu Search, Bing, Google, ByteDance, and Xiaodu Technology (a $5.5B valuation exit), giving the team rare full-stack credibility in AI search. [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/54909419)

---

## Company Snapshot
| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Founded | 2023 |
| HQ | Not found in table |
| Employees | 45 (+55.2% 90d) |
| Products | AI-driven search engine with advanced relevance algorithms; AI agent framework for user engagement |
| Customers | B2B (enterprise) |
| Total Funding | $435,000,000 |
| Last Round | $275,000,000 (November 2025) |

*Last updated: Data as of most recent signal retrieval [[4]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/54909419)*

---

## Founders

**Eric Jing** — Co-founder & CEO | [linkedin.com/in/eric-jing-5397a1b](https://linkedin.com/in/eric-jing-5397a1b)
Previously CEO of Xiaodu Technology, where he closed a Series B at a $5.5B valuation. Before that, he was Chief Product Manager of Search and Corporate VP at Baidu, and Principal Development Manager of Bing Search at Microsoft, where he contributed to the launch of Bing.com. [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/54909419)

**Kay Zhu** — Co-founder & CTO | [linkedin.com/in/kay-zhu-522b275](https://linkedin.com/in/kay-zhu-522b275)
Served as CTO at Xiaodu Technology, building the company from inception to a $5.1B Series B valuation. Prior to that, she was Chief Architect of Baidu Search — where she launched the world's first DNN ranking model — and a Staff Software Engineer at Google focused on core search ranking and web anti-spam. [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/54909419)

**Ray Zhong** — Co-founder, Software Engineer | [linkedin.com/in/ray-zhong-a3735627](https://linkedin.com/in/ray-zhong-a3735627)
Served as Chief Architect of DuerOS at Baidu from 2017 to 2023, leading development of the conversational AI platform. Prior to Baidu, he spent a decade at Google as a staff software engineer contributing to core search ranking algorithms and Google Assistant's home automation features. [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/54909419)

**Lenjoy Lin** — Co-Founder | [linkedin.com/in/lenjoy](https://linkedin.com/in/lenjoy)
Led engineering for TikTok Ads Measurement & Targeting at ByteDance, founding and scaling that department. Earlier held engineering leadership roles at Houzz, Pinterest (Homefeed Ads), and YouTube, where he was a founding member of the team that rebuilt the ads serving and quality stack. [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/54909419)

**Wen S.** — Co-Founder & COO | [linkedin.com/in/wen-sang](https://linkedin.com/in/wen-sang)
Previously Co-Founder & CEO of Smarking Inc., which was acquired in 2022, and Chief Product and Technology Officer at JustPark. Holds a B.S. in Automotive Engineering from Nanjing University. [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/54909419)

---

## Key Signals
• **[Hiring]** Headcount up 55.2% in 90 days — Source: Genspark Key Signals [[4]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/54909419), current
• **[Web Traffic]** Monthly traffic at 14.94M visits, up 16.3% in 30 days — Source: Genspark Key Signals [[4]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/54909419), current
• **[Funding]** Series B closed at $275M on November 20, 2025; total raised $435M — Source: Genspark Company Profile [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/54909419), 2025-11-20

---

## In the News

No recent news available. [[1]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/54909419)

---

## Meeting Prep

**Key questions to ask:**
• The $275M Series B closed in November 2025 — how is capital being allocated, and what milestones (revenue, enterprise contracts, product launches) does this round fund through? [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/54909419)
• Headcount is up 55.2% in 90 days from a base of just 45 employees — what functions are being hired, and how does the team plan to maintain culture and execution quality at this growth rate? [[4]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/54909419)
• Both Eric Jing and Kay Zhu previously worked together at Xiaodu Technology — how does Genspark's AI search approach differentiate from their prior work, and what is the specific B2B go-to-market motion (direct sales, API, platform)? [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/54909419)
• Web traffic is strong at 14.94M monthly visits, but the company is classified as B2B — how much of that traffic converts to enterprise pipeline, and what does the current ARR or revenue trajectory look like? [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/54909419)[[4]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/54909419)

**Recommended next step:** Request a product demo focused on the AI agent framework and ask for a customer reference from a current enterprise account to validate B2B traction behind the traffic numbers.
